reference: I fell down the stairs yesterday and landed square in the middle of my back. My back is stiff today, but I woke up last night with stomach pain. It feels worse than a stomach ache but does not hurt to breathe. The stomach pain has been occurring on and off today as well. Sometimes it is sharp, but it feels mainly like a constant bubble of pain in my stomach.
text: I don't think that you're the kind of person to do that.
